title: Set Up Redis Cache for Endpoint
description: Add Redis caching layer to a read-heavy API endpoint.
steps: Identify endpoint and expected cache hit ratio
Choose cache key strategy: entity ID, query params hash, or composite
Set appropriate TTL based on data freshness requirements
Implement cache-aside pattern: check cache → miss → query DB → store in cache → return
Add cache invalidation on write operations (delete or update cached key)
Add cache metrics: hit/miss counters in Prometheus
Test: verify cached response matches DB response
Monitor: check cache hit ratio after deployment
